zh.Hassop, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Eyre於1370年出生在英國德比夏爾哈黑薩時，他的父親Nicholas Eyre22歲，母親Annabella Archer22歲。他於1391年與Johanna Elizabeth Barlow在英國德比夏爾哈黑薩結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1459年3月21日在他的家鄉享年89歲。

zh-hans.Hassop, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾哈索普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Eyre于1370年出生在英国德比夏爾哈黑薩时，他的父亲Nicholas Eyre22岁，母亲Annabella Archer22岁。他于1391年与Johanna Elizabeth Barlow在英国德比夏爾哈黑薩结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1459年3月21日在他的家乡享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eyre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: This name was that of a historically prominent family in Galway (Ireland) since the 1650s.

variants.name: Ayer
meanings: English and Scottish: from Middle English eir, eyr ‘heir’ (Anglo-Norman French heyr, Old French (h)eir, Latin heres). Forms such as Richard le Heyer were frequent in Middle English, denoting a man who was well known to be the heir to the main property in a particular locality, either one who had already inherited or one with great expectations.
English: from the Anglo-Norman French and Middle English personal name Aier (ancient Germanic Agihari).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Eyre was born in 1370, in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, his father, Nicholas Eyre, was 22 and his mother, Annabella Archer, was 22. He married Johanna Elizabeth Barlow in 1391, in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. He died on 21 March 1459, in his hometown, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Eyre est né en 1370, à Hathersage, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Eyre, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Annabella Archer, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Elizabeth Barlow en 1391, à Hathersage, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1459, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Eyre 1370 in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Eyre 22 und seine Mutter Annabella Archer 22. Er hat 1391 in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England Johanna Elizabeth Barlow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 21. März 1459 im Alter von 89 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Eyre è nato il nel 1370 nel Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Eyre, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Annabella Archer, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Elizabeth Barlow nel 1391, nel Hathersage, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. Morì il 21 marzo 1459, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.Hathersage, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアハスエルサッジ
ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Eyreが1370年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハスエルサッジで生まれた時，父Nicholas Eyreは22歳，母Annabella Archerは22歳であった。1391年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアハスエルサッジでJohanna Elizabeth Barlowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1459年3月21日に故郷で89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Eyre(이)가 1370년 영국 더비실르 하더사지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Eyre(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Annabella Archer(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1391년 영국 더비실르 하더사지에서 Johanna Elizabeth Barlow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1459년 3월 21일 그의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Hassop, Derbyshire, England: Hassop, Deorbyscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Eyre nasceu em 1370, em Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Eyre, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Annabella Archer, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Elizabeth Barlow em 1391, em Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 21 de março de 1459, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Eyre родился в 1370 г. в местности хатирсадж, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Eyre было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Annabella Archer, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Elizabeth Barlow в 1391 г. в местности хатирсадж, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 21 марта 1459 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Eyre nació en 1370, en Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Eyre, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Annabella Archer, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Johanna Elizabeth Barlow en 1391, en Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1459, en su pueblo, a la edad de 89 años.
